specialty arabica northern-thai supplier blend single-origin

Hillkoff

ฮิลล์คอฟฟ์

4.3
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
310 reviews
Origin Northern Thailand Highlands
Roast Levels light medium dark
Price Range ฿180–420 / 200g
Founded 2003
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag, bulk

Hillkoff is Thailand's leading specialty coffee supplier and exporter, working directly with highland arabica growers across northern Thailand. Trusted by cafés and restaurants nationwide for consistent quality and ethical sourcing.

Official Website ↗

Flavor Profile

Versatile and well-crafted. Their house blends offer balanced caramel and mild fruit notes, while single-origin offerings show distinct terroir. Reliable quality across all roast levels.

Tasting Notes

caramel mild fruit balanced body clean finish

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
3/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
3/5
Aroma
4/5
